name: Beef Roast with Mushroom Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mushroom stuffing: In a frying pan, heat vegetable oil and sauté onion for 3 minutes until lightly browned. Add mushroom pieces and cook for 5 minutes. Stir in parsley, chives, tomato paste, bread crumbs, salt, pepper, and paprika. Mix well.
2. Spread half of the stuffing onto one side of each flank steak. Roll up jelly-roll style and tie with thread or string.
3. In a Dutch oven, cook bacon until partially done. Add the meat rolls and brown on all sides for about 10 minutes. Add onions and sauté for 5 minutes.
4. Pour in hot beef broth and cover the pot. Simmer for 1 hour. Remove the meat to a serving platter.
5. Season the pan juices with dijon mustard, salt, and pepper. Stir in tomato catsup.
6. Serve the gravy separately.
